name: Steamed Stuffed Clams
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Ginger root, peeled and minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the clams into a large pot together with the salt and 1/2 cup of water. Place over high heat.
2. Steam the clams for about 5 minutes, shaking the pot frequently, just until the clams open.
3. Drain the clams. Remove clams from the shells, discarding any shells that have not opened.
4. Mince the remaining clams.
5. Rinse and dry 18 half shells.
6. In a mixing bowl, combine the minced clams and all the remaining ingredients. Mix well, and toss the mixture lightly against the inside of the bowl to combine and compact it.
7. With a spoon dipped in cold water, stuff the reserved shells with this mixture, mounding it and smoothing it.
8. Arrange clams on a tray in a steamer for 20 minutes.
